chunks.title: Reign of Jehoahaz
chunks.reason: Describes the reign, sins, and deliverance of King Jehoahaz.

chunks.title: Reign of Joash
chunks.reason: Describes the reign and death of King Joash.

chunks.title: Death of Elisha
chunks.reason: Narrates the interaction between Joash and Elisha, the prophecy, and Elisha's posthumous miracle.

chunks.title: Restoration of Israel
chunks.reason: Summarizes the oppression by Aram and the final victories of Joash.
